specific_question: How many Elexion Automotive vehicles have fallen victim to physical access attacks from diagnostic ports (OBD-II) in 2025?
answer: The cybersecurity team at Elexion Automotive published a report on October 1, 2025, that stated exactly one of their vehicles had fallen victim to a physical access attack involving the car's diagnostic port (OBD-II) so far in 2025.
dr_question: Referencing the information shared in the April 2025 article from Help Net Security, what external cybersecurity market data involving the automotive industry should Elexion Automotive analyze by the end of Q4 2025 to protect consumer data and safety?
